Scaled voice and conversational infrastructure to 6M+ users while maintaining sub-200 ms conversational latency and 99.9% uptime.       "description": "- Architected and owned the real-time voice call and conversational avatar infrastructure for Spark.E and TutorMe, scaling the systems to support 6M+ users and a $11.5M Series A.\n- Engineered a LiveKit-based agent over WebRTC to handle synchronized live audio, video, and the Spark.E avatar s interactive state, achieving sub-100ms conversational latency.\n- Developed a custom LiveKit DataChannel pipeline to inject study-set context and session state into the LLM, ensuring the avatar s responses were grounded in assigned materials.\n- Designed and deployed a Node.js authentication and token service on GCP utilizing JWT/LiveKit access tokens and Twilio SMS verification for high-concurrency access.\n- Implemented a Kafka-driven ELO feedback pipeline to analyze session data in real-time and dynamically adapt student learning paths based on performance metrics.\n- Managed the end-to-end voice session lifecycle and connection stability, ensuring 99.9% uptime during massive global traffic spikes.",

parsedJSON.summary: Full-stack engineer with 7+ years building and operating production real-time and applied AI systems. Experience designing K8s-based GPU inference platforms and low-latency streaming services using LiveKit and WebRTC, and delivering end-to-end APIs and product features with strong observability and CI/CD. Scaled voice and conversational infrastructure to 6M+ users while maintaining sub-200 ms conversational latency and 99.9% uptime. Skilled in Python, Node.js/TypeScript, Next.js/React, and productionizing model-backed services.

experience.description:
- Architected and owned the real-time voice call and conversational avatar infrastructure for Spark.E and TutorMe, scaling the systems to support 6M+ users and a $11.5M Series A.
- Engineered a LiveKit-based agent over WebRTC to handle synchronized live audio, video, and the Spark.E avatar s interactive state, achieving sub-100ms conversational latency.
- Developed a custom LiveKit DataChannel pipeline to inject study-set context and session state into the LLM, ensuring the avatar s responses were grounded in assigned materials.
- Designed and deployed a Node.js authentication and token service on GCP utilizing JWT/LiveKit access tokens and Twilio SMS verification for high-concurrency access.
- Implemented a Kafka-driven ELO feedback pipeline to analyze session data in real-time and dynamically adapt student learning paths based on performance metrics.
- Managed the end-to-end voice session lifecycle and connection stability, ensuring 99.9% uptime during massive global traffic spikes.

- Built and operated production backend services for conversational AI, shipping low-latency APIs and streaming interfaces used by voice workflows.
- Owned deployment automation for model-backed services, including CI/CD, environment promotion, canary-style rollouts, and reproducible builds across multiple environments.
- Implemented observability for real-time systems (structured logging, metrics, tracing, alerting), reducing time-to-diagnosis for latency regressions and incident response.
- Integrated speech and language components into stable production pipelines, evolving systems from classic NLU patterns toward LLM-backed orchestration where it improved product outcomes.
- Designed service boundaries and data contracts for multi-tenant operation, with attention to reliability under concurrent traffic and failure-mode handling.
- Built internal tooling to speed iteration (evaluation harnesses, replay workflows, regression checks), improving confidence when shipping changes to live traffic.
- Partnered cross-functionally with product and applied teams to translate model behavior into deployable, measurable services, and to close gaps discovered in production.

- Built custom TensorFlow ops to simulate neural network execution on the DPU Compiler, enabling early validation of operator behavior and alignment with hardware constraints.
- Developed and optimized neural networks for audio and vision classification using PyTorch.
- Designed and maintained an interactive visualization tool for error tracing on Wave's proprietary DPU-based compiler.
- Developed full-stack admin tools with Node.js, React, and GraphQL for secure login and data transfer to AWS S3, deployed via Docker containers.
- Reduced API payload size by 40% and streamlined file management workflows.

ats_recommendations: Ensure all acronyms are expanded on first use.
Add specific section headers like 'Projects' to improve ATS parsing.
Ensure contact information is consistently formatted to improve extraction.
